title: CTO | vCTO | Chief Technology Officer - WFH & Flexible
description:
Job Description & Requirements

We’re hiring a strategic and hands-on CTO to join our on-demand leadership pool. In this role, you’ll guide early-stage and scaling businesses through technology strategy, architecture planning, and product delivery execution. This is a flexible and part-time engagement. This is an ideal side role for experienced tech leaders who want to apply their skills across multiple businesses and it is flexible, impactful, and financially rewarding.

Key Responsibilities

Technology Strategy & Conceptual Architecture

  • Define scalable, modular technology blueprints that support platform thinking and growth.
  • Guide tech investments across funding stages, product phases, and market shifts.

AI Integration & Agentic Systems

  • Identify AI-native opportunities and design agentic systems to automate and scale decisions.
  • Govern LLM, GenAI, and data pipeline usage with a focus on ethics, privacy, and security.

DevOps, Cloud & Engineering Maturity

  • Modernize CI/CD, observability, and DevSecOps practices to reduce time-to-market.
  • Optimize infrastructure with cost-aware cloud engineering and performance tuning.

Product & Roadmap Ownership

  • Align product delivery with outcomes using lean sprints, feedback loops, and velocity tracking.
  • Guide prioritization, MVP scope, and tech debt tradeoffs with executive clarity.

Tech Talent & Culture Development

  • Coach tech leads, refine team structures, and embed scalable decision frameworks.
  • Create a culture of engineering excellence and innovation readiness.

AI Cost & Tooling Governance

  • Right-size AI and cloud tooling for scale, security, and budget.
  • Integrate FinOps strategies and platform benchmarking to manage innovation cost-effectively.

Requirements

  • 10+ years in software architecture, platform engineering, or product leadership.
  • Proven experience leading AI adoption, DevOps, and digital scaling in startup or growth-stage firms.
  • Deep expertise in cloud-native architecture, LLM integration, and agile leadership.
  • Past CTO or technical founder experience preferred.
  • Flexible engagement availability as fractional CTO or strategic technology advisor.

Engagement Benefits

  • Lead multiple high-impact projects without full-time commitment
  • Monthly recurring income across client engagements
  • Potential to earn more depending on engagement scope
  • Mostly remote and flexible, work from anywhere
  • Join expert-only C-level events and advisory circles
  • Perfect side role if you have bandwidth beyond your day job

postedCompany.description:
ASLabs is the cybersecurity division of Cybercore Labs, built to protect and empower SMEs and enterprises across the globe. We deliver enterprise-grade cybersecurity solutions with the agility, clarity, and commitment modern organizations need to stay resilient in a rapidly evolving threat landscape.

Our core offerings include:
✔ Identity & Access Management
✔ Data Security & Privacy
✔ Managed Cybersecurity & BAU Operations

We also offer fractional CxO services:

✔ CISO-as-a-Service – Security strategy & compliance leadership

✔ CTO-as-a-Service – Secure technology enablement

✔ CIO-as-a-Service – Business-aligned IT direction


Driven by purpose, ASLabs exists to secure meaningful progress, for businesses and for the world. Through our work, we help organizations build trust, ensure compliance, and scale with confidence.

Powered by Cybercore Labs, our mission extends beyond Cybersecurity as 50% profits purposefully engaged to uplift the undeserved communities. 


Websites: 

https://cybercorelabs.co/

https://ahoseclabs.com/
